it IS to mimmick bees and let them invade hives more safely

also death heads are a (comparatively) rare kind of moth that eats! most moths after they come out of the cocoon have no mouth anymore, they just use the energy they stored as a catepillar to go find a mate and then die
but death heads actually have a probiscis like a butterfly and can eat to keep going for much longer!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3hZi-CoXqQ0 eating, vs something like a saturnidae family moth https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/98924390

embeds.title: Watch how I feed a moth (deaths head hawk moths)
embeds.description:
A quick guide to how I feed my deaths head hawk moths! 
It can be tricky but with practice it gets easier for you and the moths 
These moths will feed every other day and will live for around 6 weeks
